message:
fix(tmux,theme): resolve GitHub issues #5 and #6

Issue #6 - Pane titles overwritten by tmux automatic-rename:
- Updated SetPaneTitle() to disable allow-rename option after setting title
- This prevents tmux from overwriting NTM's pane naming convention when
  agent processes (node, python, etc.) start running
- Fix is per-pane so it won't affect other tmux sessions or panes

Issue #5 - OSC response codes appearing in TUI over SSH:
- Added SSH detection in detectDarkBackground() to skip OSC queries
- Over SSH, network latency can cause terminal responses to arrive after
  the TUI has taken over stdin, causing escape sequences to leak into input
- Now defaults to dark theme (Mocha) over SSH connections
- Users can still override with NTM_THEME environment variable

Also reviewed and closed:
- Issue #4: Already fixed in commit 7ed3688 (cass CLI invocation)
- Issue #3: Unable to reproduce (C-m and Enter are equivalent in tmux)
